content_body: A "Re-Uniting" of best friends could not have happened at a more beautiful, awesome place! the scenic view, the welcoming decor - all just made our stay so beautifully memorable! Our best friend Joy always searches and finds the 5 star - perfect places! She has done it again! Thank you for sharing! We take away memories to last a lifetime! Your beautiful place has been so much a part of that! Would love to return!
title: Amazing and Breathtaking Views in the North Georgia Mountains
